title: BEM-848 response writer contract
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 10:25 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem847_execute_after_bem846.json')
# Validator fails if no real Claude response exists after Claude action completes.
validator=Path('scripts/validate_real_claude_response.py')
validator.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport sys\nfrom pathlib import Path\nD=Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt")\nreal=[]\nblockers=[]\nif D.exists():\n    for p in sorted(D.glob("*")):\n        if not p.is_file():\n            continue\n        txt=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")\n        up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+" "+txt).lower()\n        bad="NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL" in up or "RUNTIME BLOCKER" in up or "not treat this as claude" in low\n        ok=("DECISION:" in up and ("APPROVED" in up or "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in up or "BLOCKED" in up) and ("CLAUDE RESPONSE" in up or "Claude Internal Auditor" in txt))\n        if bad:\n            blockers.append(str(p))\n        elif ok:\n            real.append(str(p))\nif real:\n    print("real_claude_response_found="+real[-1])\n    sys.exit(0)\nprint("real_claude_response_missing; blocker_files="+str(blockers[-5:]))\nsys.exit(2)\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
changed=False
if wf.exists():
    # Strengthen prompt if present.
    if 'CLAUDE RESPONSE' not in text:
        text=text.replace('Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with BEM id in filename.', 'Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem848_claude_response.md. The first heading must contain CLAUDE RESPONSE. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.')
        changed=True
    # Add validation after Claude action if missing.
    if 'scripts/validate_real_claude_response.py' not in text:
        anchor='      - name: Record dispatcher completion\n'
        validation='''      - name: Validate real Claude response\n        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && steps.claude_response.outcome == 'success'\n        run: python3 scripts/validate_real_claude_response.py\n'''
        if anchor in text:
            text=text.replace(anchor, validation+anchor,1)
        else:
            text=text+'\n'+validation
        changed=True
    wf.write_text(text)
status='response_writer_contract_patched' if changed else 'response_writer_contract_already_present'
state={'bem':'BEM-848','status':status,'bem847_status':prev.get('status'),'dispatcher_exists':wf.exists(),'validator':str(validator),'workflow_changed':changed,'next_action':'dispatch Claude again and require validator to fail if real response absent','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem848_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem848_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.md').write_text('# BEM-848 | Patch Claude Response Writer Contract | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md').write_text('Next: dispatch Claude again and require real response validator. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-848'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: dispatch Claude again and require validator proof.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(validator),str(wf),'governance/state/bem848_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.json','governance/reports/bem848_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Patched Claude dispatcher response writer contract and added validator so missing real Claude response becomes an explicit workflow failure')
"""
No issue comments.
